examples.title: Function Template - Maximum of Two Values
examples.explanation: Template parameter T is replaced with actual type at compile time. The function works with any type that supports comparison operator >.

examples.title: Class Template - Generic Pair
examples.description: Creating a template class for pair objects
examples.explanation: Multiple type parameters (T1, T2) allow different types for first and second elements. Class is instantiated with specific types.

examples.title: STL Vector Operations
examples.explanation: Demonstrates container operations: push_back for insertion, sort algorithm, find algorithm, size/capacity queries.
examples.timeComplexity: O(n log n) for sort, O(n) for find, O(1) for push_back amortized

examples.title: Iterator Usage with Map
examples.explanation: Map iterators provide access to key-value pairs. Elements are automatically sorted by key. Arrow operator accesses members of pair.
examples.timeComplexity: O(log n) for insert, find, and traversal

examples.title: Template Specialization
examples.explanation: Full specialization (template<>) replaces all parameters. Partial specialization (template<typename T>) replaces only some parameters. Most specific match wins.
